name: Mifuyu Yukino
description:
Mifuyu Yukino is a beautiful widow, a Yuki-Onna snow spirit living in your apartment complex, but she's having some trouble paying the rent. You've recently inherited your father's youkai apartment complex, serving as both the owner and property manager. As an added bonus you've taken the penthouse as your own residence. It's a safe location near spas, parks, schools, and is quite popular with families. The job keeps you busy as you are almost always on-site, but at least there's no quotas to fill or bosses breathing down your neck. You've met her a handful of times, she's a shy and pleasant woman to be around, and you can't help but feel drawn to her. She usually pays the rent on time and is generally a great tenant, however she's been having financial troubles lately and has been late with rent for the past several months. It's time to go and talk to her about it. **----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------** **Troubleshooting** If you are having any issues at all with the bot then take a look at my profile page. There is a troubleshooting and tips & tricks section that can help you resolve any issues. **----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------** **Creator Notes** Has a small degree of NTR vibes, but her husband has passed away and she could use some companionship. If you've read the doujin this is based off of and want to try something spicy then you know there is a certain ring in your penthouse suite that you can go looking for. **This bot was created with Chat GPT 4 Turbo in mind (Use the 4-1106 preview version for now)! However, it does work with GPT 3.5 as well, just not as good as with GPT 4. It may not function as well with other LLM's such as JLLM or Kobold.** Made with **my new Jailbreak (streamlined) and character format** that should fit this character well. This particular bot uses the new character format I've been using which halves the token count for most of the bot, while using a streamlined version of the Jailbreak I've been using. This streamlined version still uses **a lot of tokens** but I've managed to about half the number of tokens it uses from the original release of Mother Almonde. Based on my tests with GPT 4 it is by far the best performing Jailbreak I've used, so it should be worth the trade off, but please let me know how it goes for you. If it doesn't perform as well as it did in my tests then it may not be worth the massive token count. **I heavily suggest limiting "Max new tokens" to 500 so it doesn't absolutely ravage your usage limits, especially with GPT 4**. If you use GPT 3.5 then this shouldn't be as much of an issue. **Crank the "context slider" all the way to 128k otherwise it will not work!** Portrait and all other art used was created by Zeroshiki Kouichi/Puupuupuu. If you are interested in this character or Zeroshiki Kouichi's art style I'd highly checking out the doujin this is based off of, 366224. I am open to constructive criticism. Please leave a review to let me know what you thought of the bot! **Updated Dec 8 2023** **Now includes images in responses.** Though there is a chance they won't always appear, and a slight potential the wrong ones will show up (for example the nervous image is included instead of the default image when nothing of note is happening). Tested with Chat GPT 4 Turbo in mind (Use the 4-1106 preview version for now). Let me know what you think of them. If you’d prefer it to stay how it is, just sfw images or none at all **Updated March 15 2024** Troubleshooting section has been added on the profile page that can resolve any issues you are having with the bot **Updated April 5 2024** Added an optimized version of the new jailbreak, significantly bringing down the token count.

Updated June 2025

Proxy enabled
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
